title: rosa rubiginosa var. iberica
intro: Rosa rubiginosa var. iberica, also known as the Iberian sweetbriar, is a fragrant and flowering plant species in the rose family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The medicinal properties of Rosa rubiginosa var. iberica have been linked to various health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
